1.content: Now, which master are you? Male or Female?
1.title: Starting Page

1131.content:
You are the Master or Chaldea. You have saved the world from many singularities and a certain servant believes you deserve a break and to have some “fun”. This servant is Merlin. Unbeknownst to you, while you were sleeping he snuck in and shrank you with a spell. You begin to wake up.

Stirring awake you notice your covers are much bigger than they should be. Being used to such strange occurrences at this you dug your way out of your covers. You spot a note on your table and barely make the jump to it. “That what close” you say to yourself. You read the note and it says the following. “This a reward for your brave actions on your missions. I’ve shrunk you down and made a lot more durable. So don’t worry about falls or anything of the like. Also, to spice things up I’ve cast another spell that makes it harder for servants to find you. PS.I have some fellow servants working with me so be careful who you trust. Singed Merlin PPS. This paper explodes.” You bolt away from the paper and jump onto the chair for that table. You land on the cushion and notice that the paper simply sizzled and disappeared. “Damn that Merlin. Him and his stupid pranks.”

Just then you see Scathach enter your room. “Master, it is time for your training.” She says in a causal tone. She looks around and notices you’re not in here. “Hm, I’ll wait until they get back. She pulls the chair from the table and plants her amazing rear on it. She doesn’t notice a single thing wrong with the chairs cushion.

“Scathach! Wait!” You yell, but her ass continues it’s descent onto you. You try to run last second but get smushed by her ass. You find yourself smushed between her two ass cheeks. Her purple body suit clinging tightly to her butt. This has the side effect of letting you settle within her ass crack. You try to squirm out, but you feel her grind into her seat. Her ass swallows you and welcomes you to your new fleshy prison. Things seem to have settled for now. Up above, the beautiful god slayer remains in her seat waiting for you. That will never come as you are already there. Stuck beneath her, in her ass.

Roughly 30 minutes pass by with you being smothered by her spandex covered ass. Scathach has shifted a couples times and has consequently gotten you stuck to the thong like material on the other side of her ass. Her ass cheeks mold around you keep you in your proper place. She eventually finally gets up and heads out of your room. Unluckily for you., you follow with. Her ass cheeks keep you in your place as she walks. If anything you’re being ironed into her ass crack even further now. You’ve no idea what her destination is, but you do know that you want to get out of this place.

Scathach decides to go and train on her own. Not that it doesn’t any good as she’s already reached the pinnacle of combat. If anything it was just to pass time and to work up a sweat. She’d have to discipline Master for skipping on training. Little does she know that you didn’t and are about to tag along with her in her routine and in the worst place possible.

Arriving at the gym Scathach finally stops walking and looks for an adequate partner to spar with. Before that she decides to get a warm up by heading to a treadmill designed for A servants high speed. She steps onto it and gets to jogging at regular pace. Even a servants regular pace is already far more than a humans. This doesn’t spell well for you.

You finally feel her ass cheeks stop from pounding into you. You feel your captress step into something and instant feel her cheeks begin to pound into you at high speed. Smack after smack hits your small form and keeps your ironed to the now sweaty depths of Scathachs ass. “Stop please!” You hell but your cries fall on deaf ears. You begin to try and use a command seal but notice you spent all of them already and are waiting for them to recharge. “God No, please!” you yell again, but are met with Scathach moving with a full sprint. You are now completely at her ass’s will as you can’t move even a millimeter. You are now surely flattened and ironed to her spandex body suit. Right in the depths of her sweaty ass crack.

Scathach steps off the treadmill and goes up to the sparring partner she has chosen. You are coming along with and are going to suffer in her ass whether you like it or not it seems. Panting you try your hardest to pry yourself away from her butt. You have little success. Finally scathach steps up to her sparring partner.
Who are they?
1131.title: Scáthach

Your servant is confused and begins to explore your basement
12131.content:
To say you were excited for the Holy Grail War would be an understatement of an understatement. You'd practically been preparing for it for the last decade. Ever since that great fire back in 1994 at the end of the last war, you'd been training for the day you could summon your own servant and compete.

So imagine your shock and awe when you saw those precious command seals appear on the back of your hand that fateful morning. It felt as if all your dreams were coming true. The grail had deemed you worthy to compete for a chance to win the ultimate prize... a wish. Any wish your heart desired.

You remembered not paying much attention in school that day as you tried to finalize what servant you wanted to summon. You knew for certain you wanted someone from the Saber class as it was the most powerful and you definitely wanted a warrior who was noble and chivalrous. The last thing you wanted was to be partnered with a jerk.

After school you went straight home instead of the archery club and went to work skimming through your history books. There were so many warriors from times past that wielded blades and embodied nobility, but there was one above all others that stood out to you... King Arthur Pendragon.

You knew the story of the king and the knights of the round like the back of your hand. Your father actually used to tell it to you when you were younger just because he knew how much you liked it. The king who wielded the sword of promised victory and the sheath known as Avalon would make the perfect servant.

With your mind firmly set on this noble warrior you began the long and tiring process of gaining a catalyst for the summoning. It took a few days but eventually a favor owed to you by the priest who'd be officiating the Holy Grail War, came through and got you what you needed. You came home to find a small black box in your mailbox with a letter from the odd man attached. Inside was a little chunk of stone that to the casual observer looked like nothing of note. You knew better though.

You went to bed early that day and set your alarm to an hour before midnight. That gave you more than enough time to get all the preparations for the summoning in order. At 12 o'clock midnight your magical power would be at it's peak and you'd summon the most powerful servant class in the entire war.

It was 11:55 when you began the ritual and all around you you could feel your magic energy spiking. You said the chant, gave your blood, and channeled your power forth. The clock struck twelve, and your energy surged! Power and pain erupted from your body and you coiled from the burning sensation on your hand.

The summoning circle began to glow an ominous blue glow and the power in the air caused any loose paper and junk to be tossed aside. The pain was starting to become too much, you though you might black out. But then something else happened, the pain ceased and your entire world went white.

It was like a flashbang had gone off in your near vicinity and it was hard to focus. The light began to die down, but your vision was fuzzy. You couldn't tell what was around you, yet the voice that came from above was loud and clear. Wait!? Above!?

"Are you worthy to be... my... master?"

It was then your vision cleared and turned towards the sound. What you saw made your eyes bulge. You'd done it! You'd successfully summoned a servant. But... something wasn't right. King Arthur was a man, and this person was clearly female. Golden blonde hair, jade eyes, silver armor and a blue dress? Not to mention she was huge!

Wait a second. Taking a brief moment to survey your surroundings it became all to clear what had just happened.

"Oh shit." you groaned.
12131.title: The King of Knights

124.content: Which Caster do you want?
124.title: Caster

I leave no rules, simply enjoy.
